description: A marketing manager needs to launch a weekly email campaign announcing new arrivals to all subscribed customers.

nodes.task_description: Select the email template for 'New Arrivals'.

expected_outcome.value: The manager chooses the correct email design.

nodes.task_description: Select the target audience (e.g., 'All Subscribed Customers').

expected_outcome.value: The manager defines the recipient list for the campaign.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the email to be sent at the desired date and time and activate the campaign.

expected_outcome.value: The email campaign is successfully scheduled for delivery.
